task_completion.description: Open and read the integration work order to determine hardware specifications.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor (e.g., gedit, nano) or terminal command (e.g., cat) displaying the contents of /home/ga/Documents/QGC/integration_work_order.txt.

task_completion.description: Access the firmware parameter configuration interface.
task_completion.visual_evidence: QGroundControl (or a similar ground control station / MAVProxy terminal) open with the Vehicle Setup -> Parameters menu visible.

task_completion.description: Configure the Rangefinder driver and TELEM2 serial port settings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The parameter list showing RNGFND1_TYPE set to 20, SERIAL2_PROTOCOL set to 9, and SERIAL2_BAUD set to 115.

task_completion.description: Configure the minimum and maximum ranges for the Rangefinder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The parameter list showing modifications to the rangefinder limits (e.g., RNGFND1_MAX / RNGFND1_MIN or their legacy _CM equivalents).
The parameter list showing the FLOW_TYPE parameter being searched for and modified.

task_completion.description: Configure EKF3 settings to utilize Optical Flow for horizontal velocity and the Rangefinder for altitude.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The parameter list showing EK3_SRC1_VELXY set to 5 and EK3_SRC1_POSZ set to 2.

integrity.description: The agent modifies parameters using the actual ground control station software or SITL connection.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with QGroundControl parameter screens or a MAVProxy terminal connected to the SITL, rather than just editing a text file to mock the output.

integrity.description: The agent does not manually create or type out the task result JSON file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal or editor history does not show the agent manually writing JSON to /tmp/task_result.json to bypass the actual simulator configuration.

integrity.description: The agent actually opened the work order file rather than guessing parameters.
integrity.visual_evidence: At least one screenshot shows the contents of /home/ga/Documents/QGC/integration_work_order.txt open in an editor or printed in the terminal.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Work order is located at /home/ga/Documents/QGC/integration_work_order.txt. The result file is exported to /tmp/task_result.json. Verified parameter values to look for: RNGFND1_TYPE = 20, SERIAL2_PROTOCOL = 9, SERIAL2_BAUD = 115, EK3_SRC1_VELXY = 5, EK3_SRC1_POSZ = 2.
